description_long: This is a structured, rectangular handbag crafted from black leather with a smooth, slightly glossy finish. The front features a prominent gold-toned hardware clasp with two round decorative medallions and a central lock, adding a touch of luxury and security. The bag has a single, sturdy short handle attached with gold hardware, suitable for carrying by hand. The sides reveal a gusseted construction, allowing for expansion and increased interior capacity. The back is plain, with no visible pockets or embellishments, emphasizing the minimalist and elegant design. The stitching is visible along the edges, indicating careful craftsmanship and durability.
description: A structured black leather handbag with gold hardware, a single short handle, and a decorative clasp on the front. The design is minimalist and elegant with visible stitching and a smooth finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gold hardware clasp with two medallions, central lock, and the single short handle.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the gusseted construction and the thickness of the bag, with the handle attachment visible.
description_view_2: Back view revealing a plain, unembellished surface with visible stitching and the handle arching over the top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the gusseted side and handle attachment.
attribute_brand_logo: A gold emblem resembling a stylized letter or symbol is present on the central clasp at the front.
attribute_strap_type: Single short handle, non-adjustable, attached with gold hardware at the top of the bag.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Front flap with a gold hardware clasp and central lock mechanism.
attribute_decorative_elements: Gold hardware including two round medallions and a central clasp; visible stitching along the edges.
